title: Dark Mode and Wallpaper
drDigitalIntro: Dark Mode makes your screen easier on your eyes by using dark backgrounds and light text. Light Mode is the traditional look. You can schedule Dark Mode to turn on automatically at night. Your wallpaper is the background image on your desktop. Choose from built-in images or upload your own photos. A comfortable display makes using your Mac more enjoyable.

playgroundTask.instructions: You're working late and your screen is too bright. Turn on Night Shift in Appearance settings.

drDigitalSuccess: Night Shift reduces blue light to make the screen warmer and easier on your eyes at night.
drDigitalHint: Open Appearance in Settings and look for the Night Shift toggle.
